---
pagetitle: "Muammer Beslen, MD"
description-meta: "Field epidemiologist & physician. Notes and open-source guides on clinical research methodology."
about:
  template: trestles
  image: ../assets/profile-placeholder.svg
  image-width: "200px"
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/drmuammer
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/drmuammer
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: "mailto:contact@muammerbeslen.com"
toc: false
---

::: {.eyebrow-label}
Field epidemiologist · Physician
:::

# Hi, I'm Muammer.

I work on clinical research, biostatistics, and causal inference.
Most of the content I produce is in Turkish — making methodological resources
accessible to Turkish-speaking researchers is a personal priority.

Two things matter in my work: **drawing valid causal conclusions from observational data**,
and **sharing what I learn along the way**.

```{=html}
<section class="section">
  <div class="section-eyebrow">Open-source</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">Featured guides</h2>

  <a href="https://drmuammer.github.io/istatistik-yontem-secimi/" class="resource-row">
    <div class="resource-info">
      <div class="resource-title">Statistical Method Selection</div>
      <div class="resource-desc">Interactive guide for choosing the right statistical test in medical research. Wizard, decision map, draggable D3 demos.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="resource-tags">
      <span class="tag">TR · EN</span>
      <span class="tag tag-accent">Interactive</span>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a href="https://drmuammer.github.io/veri-seti-guvenligi/" class="resource-row">
    <div class="resource-info">
      <div class="resource-title">Data Security <span class="muted-suffix">— in Turkish</span></div>
      <div class="resource-desc">De-identification, hashing and encryption guide for clinical research data. HIPAA, GDPR and KVKK frameworks.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="resource-tags">
      <span class="tag">TR</span>
    </div>
  </a>
</section>
```

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
Most content on this site is in Turkish. The English version covers the homepage and CV; for English-language inquiries, [please get in touch](../iletisim.qmd).
:::
